name: @knewbeing/vitepress-plugin-blogs
description: Monorepo for VitePress blog plugins: utilities and auto-sidebar/TOC plugin.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @knewbeing/markdown-it-element-transform build && pnpm --filter @knewbeing/markdown-it-unlazy-img build && pnpm --filter @knewbeing/markdown-it-bi-directional-links build && pnpm --filter @knewbeing/vitepress-plugin-git-changelog build && pnpm --filter @knewbeing/vitepress-plugin-inline-link-preview build && pnpm --filter @knewbeing/vitepress-plugin-meta build && pnpm --filter @knewbeing/vitepress-plugin-index build && pnpm --filter @knewbeing/vitepress-plugin-autosidebar-toc build && pnpm --filter @knewbeing/vitepress-plugin-page-properties build && pnpm --filter @knewbeing/vitepress-plugin-remove-sidebar build && pnpm --filter @knewbeing/vitepress-plugin-nolebase build
